title: Interrupted / Discontinued Case
desc: Your counselor paused (interrupted) or closed (discontinued) your case.

fields.name: reasonGiven
fields.label: Reason counselor gave for pause/closure
fields.placeholder: e.g. Claimed lack of contact or no progress

fields.name: hadNotice
fields.label: Did you receive a written 10-day warning before closure?

fields.name: hadVaf200998
fields.label: Did you receive a formal written decision (VA Form 20-0998)?

errors: Closing a case without sending a written 10-day notice of intent to discontinue.
Failing to issue a formal written decision notice (VA Form 20-0998) explaining appeal rights.
